name: cc-chief
description: Layer 5/5 of the cc-* harness — the top brain. /chief (backed by the chief-rules skill) orchestrates the workers across a product's sub-projects, each its own git repo under the current folder. It owns the product plane — the product-wide roadmap of cross-cutting epics (roadmap-management) and the product CLAUDE.md (via /chief-init) — keeps each repo's roadmap true, and sequences and dispatches workers (as native subagents) where cross-repo work needs them. It conducts; the workers build. Built on cc-worker.
